dialogue.speaker: Elder Mira
dialogue.text: The old road is open again. That means trouble, or treasure. Usually both.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Mira
dialogue.text: Talk to everyone. Small towns hide big quests.

dialogue.speaker: Elder Mira
dialogue.text: Come back after we add inventory and I might give you a key.

dialogue.speaker: Guard Toma
dialogue.text: Hold it. Bandits were seen near the eastern trees.

dialogue.speaker: Guard Toma
dialogue.text: You can move with WASD or arrow keys. Press E or Space to talk.

dialogue.speaker: Guard Toma
dialogue.text: Very official guard advice: save before doing anything dumb.

dialogue.speaker: Merchant Pip
dialogue.text: Fresh potions! Invisible armor! Slightly haunted bread!

dialogue.speaker: Merchant Pip
dialogue.text: Okay, none of that is implemented yet. But the dialogue box works.

dialogue.speaker: Merchant Pip
dialogue.text: Next upgrade should be shops or quests. That is where this starts feeling real.
